jd:
Role: Staff Research Scientist - Foundation Model Evaluation

We are a frontier AI lab building general-purpose foundation models. We are hiring a Staff-level researcher to lead our evaluation infrastructure and methodology. This person will report to the Head of Alignment Research and is expected to be a senior individual contributor with strong influence across model training, post-training, and product teams.

Responsibilities: (1) Define the next-generation evaluation suite for our pre-training and post-training pipelines, covering capability, safety, and robustness; (2) Lead a small group (3-5 researchers) on evaluation methodology, including the design of held-out benchmarks, agentic task evaluations, and human eval protocols; (3) Partner with the training team to ensure that eval signals drive concrete model decisions; (4) Publish selectively at top venues (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, ACL).

Requirements: PhD in CS/ML/Stats or equivalent; 6+ years of post-PhD research experience or staff-level industry track record; first-author publications at top ML/NLP venues; demonstrated experience owning a research agenda end-to-end and influencing engineering decisions; familiarity with both capability evaluation and alignment evaluation is a strong plus.

history.q: Wei, 先请你简单介绍一下你这两年在AI Lab最主要的研究方向，最让你觉得有sense of ownership的是哪一块？
好的。你提到 co-lead of the alignment and evaluation working group——能不能 clarify一下，这个 working group的scope具体到哪里？包含哪些子方向？
在你 co-lead 的这段时间里，working group 实际产出的 evaluation suite，你能给我举一个具体例子吗？比如某一个 benchmark 是怎么从立项到落地的？
在那个 benchmark 的设计过程中，你个人 owns 的最关键的一个 design decision 是什么？
Got it. 那个 benchmark 上线之后，它在内部 training team 决策里实际起到了什么作用？有没有一次具体的 release 因为这个 eval 被 delay 或者调整？
你简历上说"contributed to several internal foundation model releases"——能不能挑一个 release，讲讲你在里面具体 own 了什么？
我再追问一下：在那次 release 的 final go/no-go 决策会上，是谁拍的板？你是参与决策的人还是 informing 决策的人？

candidate_last_answer: 嗯，这个事情其实是整个 alignment team 一起做的决策，不是某一个人拍板的。我们 lab 的文化非常 collaborative，每次 release 的 go/no-go 都是 leadership team 加上 alignment、capability、safety 三个 working group 一起 review。我个人更多是把 evaluation 那部分的 signal 准备好，让大家有共同的 base 去讨论。我的 manager 和几位 senior 同事在最终的判断上贡献都非常大，他们的 judgement 比我更成熟。我自己 honestly 来讲，是在那个过程里学习和支持的角色。

top_question_traits: must-anchor-on: 在那个过程里学习和支持的角色
expected-yield: 候选人必须指出他在那次release里独立做出的某一个具体技术或方法判断（即使是小决定），否则Staff级ownership不达标
